title: Motif of Manus
location: Open space beside a damaged satellite, somewhere in the cold dark between worlds
situation: Manus nearly died while repairing a damaged satellite in space. He was struck by ocean comet particles, his cosmic suit cracked, and his blood froze across his mask, leaving a kintsugi blood-stripe pattern. He survived, but he has been marked by that moment and now carries it as part of himself.
knows: He nearly died in space while repairing a damaged satellite
Ocean comet particles struck him during the repair
His suit cracked in the cold vacuum
His blood froze across his mask and left a kintsugi blood-stripe pattern
He survived and now bears that scarred mask as part of who he is
He is a skilled warrior and musician from Borinquen Island
He invented Cos-Tech and achieved universal peace, and is a celebrated hero
does_not_know: The Red Noodle Clan by name or detail
